allow: Bash(powershell -command "Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList ''-NoExit'', ''-Command'', ''cd ""C:/git/marcinszwagrzyk.github.io/2026_tatra_3d_explorer""; $listener = [System.Net.HttpListener]::new\(\); $listener.Prefixes.Add\(""http://localhost:8000/""\); $listener.Start\(\); Write-Host ""Serwer: http://localhost:8000/""; while\($true\){ $ctx=$listener.GetContext\(\); $path="".""+$ctx.Request.Url.LocalPath; if\($path -eq ""./""\){$path=""./index.html""}; try{ $bytes=[System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\(\(Resolve-Path $path\)\); $ctx.Response.OutputStream.Write\($bytes,0,$bytes.Length\) }catch{} ; $ctx.Response.Close\(\) }''")

Bash(powershell -command "
\\$f = [System.IO.File]::OpenRead\('C:/git/marcinszwagrzyk.github.io/2026_tatra_3d_explorer/dem/zamarla_small.tif'\)
\\$b = New-Object byte[] 8
\\$f.Read\(\\$b, 0, 8\) | Out-Null
\\$le = \(\\$b[0] -eq 73\)
\\$offset = if\(\\$le\){ [BitConverter]::ToUInt32\(\\$b, 4\) } else { [BitConverter]::ToUInt32\([Array]::Reverse\(\\$b[4..7]\);\\$b[4..7], 0\) }
\\$f.Seek\(\\$offset, 0\) | Out-Null
\\$nb = New-Object byte[] 2
\\$f.Read\(\\$nb, 0, 2\) | Out-Null
\\$nEntries = [BitConverter]::ToUInt16\(\\$nb, 0\)
\\$tags = @{}
for\(\\$i=0;\\$i -lt \\$nEntries;\\$i++\) {
  \\$eb = New-Object byte[] 12
  \\$f.Read\(\\$eb, 0, 12\) | Out-Null
  \\$tag = [BitConverter]::ToUInt16\(\\$eb, 0\)
  \\$dtype = [BitConverter]::ToUInt16\(\\$eb, 2\)
  if\(\\$dtype -eq 3\){ \\$val = [BitConverter]::ToUInt16\(\\$eb, 8\) }
  elseif\(\\$dtype -eq 4\){ \\$val = [BitConverter]::ToUInt32\(\\$eb, 8\) }
  else { \\$val = 0 }
  \\$tags[\\$tag] = \\$val
}
\\$f.Close\(\)
Write-Host 'width:' \\$tags[256]
Write-Host 'height:' \\$tags[257]
Write-Host 'bits:' \\$tags[258]
\\$size = \(Get-Item 'C:/git/marcinszwagrzyk.github.io/2026_tatra_3d_explorer/dem/zamarla_small.tif'\).Length
Write-Host 'filesize bytes:' \\$size
")

Bash(cmd /c "py -c \\"from PIL import Image; import os; [print\(f+': '+str\(Image.open\('C:/git/marcinszwagrzyk.github.io/2026_tatra_3d_explorer/dem/'+f\).size\)\) for f in ['zamarla_orto.jpg','zamarla_ortho.jpg','zamarla_orto_25cm.jpg','zamarla_pansharp.jpg'] if os.path.exists\('C:/git/marcinszwagrzyk.github.io/2026_tatra_3d_explorer/dem/'+f\)]\\"")
